title: dillwynia sericea subsp. rudis
intro: Dillwynia sericea subsp. rudis, also known as rough-hairy dillwynia, is a sub-species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Dillwynia sericea subsp. rudis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, although its use should be consulted with a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions or adverse effects.
